steps.name: project-setup
steps.summary: Expo SDK 54 + RN 0.81 н”„лЎңм қнҠё мҙҲкё°нҷ”, мқҳмЎҙм„ұ м„Өм№ҳ(NativeWind v4, TanStack Query, STOMP, react-navigation v7), src/ л””л үнҶ лҰ¬ кө¬мЎ° мғқм„ұ(navigation/screens/lib/hooks/types), App.tsx(QueryClientProvider+NavigationContainer+RootNavigator) мҷ„м„ұ. npm test + lint + expo export лӘЁл‘җ нҶөкіј.

steps.name: auth-flow
steps.summary: AuthProvider+useAuth Context(useAuth.tsx), secure-storage(userId/role/WHEN_UNLOCKED), apiFetch with error handling, LoginScreen/SignupScreen кө¬нҳ„, AppNavigator(Chatнғӯ+н—ӨлҚ”), jest.setup.js(expo winter globals), 6к°ң н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј(npm test+lint лӘЁл‘җ clean).

steps.name: backend-mobile-support-and-api-layer
steps.summary: SecurityConfig CORS bean м¶”к°Җ(/ws-native мқҙлҜё мЎҙмһ¬), types/api.ts м „ лҸ„л©”мқё *Response нғҖмһ… м •л№„(backend DTO 1:1 лҢҖмқ‘), query-client.ts м¶”м¶ң, лҸ„л©”мқё нӣ… 6к°ң мғқм„ұ(useRequests/useMatches/useChat/usePayment/useReview/useGuide), api-client.test.ts м¶”к°Җ. mobile: 11 tests passed, lint clean. backend: м»ҙнҢҢмқј м„ұкіө, 6к°ң pre-existing н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨнҢЁ(Docker/Spring м»Ён…ҚмҠӨнҠё мқҙмҠҲ, ліҖкІҪ м „нӣ„ лҸҷмқј).

steps.name: traveler-screens
steps.summary: LocationMap(OSM UrlTile+expo-location GPS), RequestForm(мң нҳ•/м„ӨлӘ…/мӢңк°Ғ/мӢңк°„/кёҲм•Ў), GuideOfferCard(лі„м җ/нҷ•м •лІ„нҠј), ReviewForm(лі„м җ/мҪ”л©ҳнҠё), TravelerScreen(мҡ”мІӯм—ҶмқҢвҶ’м§ҖлҸ„+ModalнҸј/OPENвҶ’мҳӨнҚјлӘ©лЎқ/MATCHEDвҶ’мұ„нҢ…+кІ°м ңмһҗлҰ¬/COMPLETEDвҶ’лҰ¬л·°мһҗлҰ¬), ChatScreen(л§Өм№ӯнҷ•м • нӣ„ мұ„нҢ…л°© н”Ңл ҲмқҙмҠӨнҷҖлҚ”). npm test 18 passed, lint clean.
